params.name: Tesla Coil
params.source: Fragment Crafting (1.6%), Lottery Machine (0.03%), Relic Forge (80 Relic RF), Tool Chest (1.5%), Wishing (0.14%)
params.description:
On Jan 31, 1891, Tesla invented a resonant transformer. The Tesla Coil consists of 2 sets of coupled resonance circuits. He conducted a large number of coil configuration tests before finding the electric power that has ultra-high voltage, low current, and high frequency AC power. This technology can be widely used in electrical lighting, fluorescence spectroscopy, high-frequency AC current, and also in radio transmission. [Types of electric coils] 1. Spark gap coil
2. Solid-state coil
